description: Case style: Analogue watch with circular case and stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial, has white markings, gunmetal toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, gunmetal toned seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three chronograph faces, year and month aperture below the 12 hour mark, annual calendarStrap style: Charcoal grey, textured, leather strap with stitched detail, has a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
